channel.title: Task Force Legal Solutions
channel.description: Welcome to Task Force Legal Solutions, your trusted resource for professional and efficient paralegal support. We specialize in providing tailored virtual legal services to attorneys and assisting individuals with do-it-yourself legal filings.

item.title: Header Section
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:

+88 (0) 123 456 78

Email Us

info@mail.com

item.title: Metform : Contact Form
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
<input
				type="text"
				class="mf-input "
				id="mf-input-text-1a861007"
				name="mf-text"
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`First Name`) } "
									onInput=${parent.handleChange}
					onBlur=${parent.handleChange}
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-text'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${el =>{
												parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)
					}}
								/>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-text"
					as=${html``}
					/>
			<input
				type="text"
				class="mf-input "
				id="mf-input-text-7ba1609b"
				name="mf-text"
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Last Name`) } "
									onInput=${parent.handleChange}
					onBlur=${parent.handleChange}
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-text'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${el =>{
												parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false,"expression":"null"}, el)
					}}
								/>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-text"
					as=${html``}
					/>
			<input 
				type="email" 
				defaultValue="" 
				class="mf-input " 
				id="mf-input-email-260b67b7" 
				name="mf-email" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Email Address`) } " 
				onBlur=${parent.handleChange} onFocus=${parent.handleChange} aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-email'] ? 'true' : 'false' } 
				ref=${el=> parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","emailMessage":"Please enter a valid Email address","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)}
							/>
						<${validation.ErrorMessage} 
				errors=${validation.errors} 
				name="mf-email" 
				as=${html``}
			/>
			<textarea id="mf-input-text-area-69c65e3a"
				name="mf-textarea" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Message`) } "
				cols="30" rows="10"
									onInput=${ parent.handleChange }
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-textarea'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${ el => parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)}
								></textarea>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-textarea"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<button type="submit" id="">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Submit Button`) } 
				</button>

item.title: Attorney Detail
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Attorney Details

Taryn Debrun

Senior Lawyer

Personal Info

Position : Senior Lawyer
Practice Area : Family Lawyer
Experience : 12 Years
Address : 75 Folsom St #600, San Francisco
Phone : +00 123 456 789
Email : email@gmail.com

Professional Skills

Proin ultricies malesuada nibh sit amet porta. Quisque at ante  ligula cursus fermentum.

Divorce & Family Cases 0% Banking & Finance 0% Property & Construction 0%

Awards & Experience

Aenean lobortis lectus non lectus porttitor commodo nec consectetur dolor.

2023 : Solo and Small Firm Awards
2022 : Samuel S. Smith Award
2021 : Jean Crowe Pro Bono Award
2020 : Difference Makers Awards
2019 : Charles R. English Award

Trial & Appeals Preparation

Prepare Trial Brief Compile & Organize Exhibits Prepare Table of Contents Prepare Table of Authorities

Discovery Preparation

Medical Record Review

Drafting Legal Pleadings and Motions

Initial Pleadings, Demand Letters, Matrimonial and Family Law Motions, Motion to Dismiss, Motion for Summary Judgment, Discovery related motions

Trial & Appeals Preparation

Discovery Preparation

Propound Discovery, Respond to Form A Interrogatories, Respond to Request for Production, Respond to Notice to Produce, Respond to Matrimonial and Family Law, Discovery, Prepare HIPAA Authorizations,

15+

item.title: Attorney Detail
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Attorney Details

Taryn Debrun

Senior Lawyer

Personal Info

Position : Senior Lawyer
Practice Area : Family Lawyer
Experience : 12 Years
Address : 75 Folsom St #600, San Francisco
Phone : +00 123 456 789
Email : email@gmail.com

Professional Skills

Proin ultricies malesuada nibh sit amet porta. Quisque at ante  ligula cursus fermentum.

Divorce & Family Cases 0% Banking & Finance 0% Property & Construction 0%

Awards & Experience

Aenean lobortis lectus non lectus porttitor commodo nec consectetur dolor.

2023 : Solo and Small Firm Awards
2022 : Samuel S. Smith Award
2021 : Jean Crowe Pro Bono Award
2020 : Difference Makers Awards
2019 : Charles R. English Award

Make An Appointment

item.title: Attorney Detail
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Attorney Details

Taryn Debrun

Senior Lawyer

Personal Info

Position : Senior Lawyer
Practice Area : Family Lawyer
Experience : 12 Years
Address : 75 Folsom St #600, San Francisco
Phone : +00 123 456 789
Email : email@gmail.com

Professional Skills

Proin ultricies malesuada nibh sit amet porta. Quisque at ante  ligula cursus fermentum.

Divorce & Family Cases 0% Banking & Finance 0% Property & Construction 0%

Awards & Experience

Aenean lobortis lectus non lectus porttitor commodo nec consectetur dolor.

2023 : Solo and Small Firm Awards
2022 : Samuel S. Smith Award
2021 : Jean Crowe Pro Bono Award
2020 : Difference Makers Awards
2019 : Charles R. English Award

Make An Appointment

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
LEGAL SOLUTIONS
Paralegal Support

01

100% ACCURACY
Document Review

02

AFFORDABLE RATES
Transparent Pricing

03

FREE CONSULTATION
Schedule Today

04

Discover Who We Are

Task Force Legal Solutions

Task Force Legal Solutions offers expert support to law firms and individuals navigating the judicial system on their own. We provide attorneys with timely and on-demand legal assistance without the overhead of full-time staff through our customized virtual paralegal services. The FIY (File-It-Yourself) solution simplifies the legal process for individuals, providing them with access to legal guidance for self-representation. We resolve the challenges with precision and reliability so that you can focus on achieving results.

Why Choose Us Over Traditional Staff?

  • Cost-Effective: Pay only for the services you need, avoiding salary, benefits, and overhead costs.

  • Scalable Support: Access experienced paralegals for small tasks or large caseloads, tailored to your needs.

  • Flexibility: Enjoy the convenience of remote, on-demand services without managing additional employees.

  • Expertise: Benefit from specialized knowledge across multiple legal areas, ensuring high-quality results.

Let Task Force Legal Solutions be your strategic partner for efficiency and excellence.

Paralegal Services

Bankruptcy Law

  • 341 meeting preparation
  • Bankruptcy petition preparation
  • Client document management
  • Docket review and monitoring
  • Judgment and lien review
  • Proof of claims review
  • Trustee and creditor communication

Criminal Defense

  • Conduct legal research
  • Coordinate court preparations
  • Draft and proofread motions
  • Gather evidence and exhibits
  • Investigate case facts/issues
  • Interview witnesses/victims
  • Support trial and hearings

Family Law

  • Child support calculations
  • Custody agreement drafting
  • Discovery request handling
  • Divorce case management
  • Exhibit preparation
  • Financial affidavit preparation
  • Legal research and summaries
  • Pleading drafting and filing
  • Trial preparation assistance

Personal Injury

  • Client and third-party communication
  • Drafting estate planning documents
  • Injury-related document preparation
  • Medical record review and summaries
  • Pleading and affidavit drafting
  • Probate petition preparation
  • Settlement and claim support

Corporate Law

  • Compliance filings preparation
  • Contract drafting and review
  • Corporate and LLC formation
  • Due diligence performance
  • Governance document management
  • Real estate transaction handling
  • Template creation and updates

Employment Law

  • Assist with EEOC filings
  • Conduct legal research
  • Draft employment contracts
  • Investigate workplace claims
  • Prepare compliance documents
  • Review workplace policies
  • Support mediation and hearings

Legal Research

  • Case law analysis (Westlaw)
  • Citation table creation
  • Compliance code checks
  • Database query management
  • eDiscovery search handling
  • Legal memo drafting
  • Precedent summarization (Casetext)
  • Research findings organization
  • Secondary source research
  • Statutory research tools (LexisNexis)

Real Estate Law

  • Closing package coordination
  • Deed and affidavit preparation
  • Document collection and filing
  • Eviction proceeding support
  • Lease agreement drafting
  • Settlement statement preparation
  • Title search performance

How can we help you?

At Task Force Legal Solutions, we pride ourselves on delivering professional, reliable, and confidential services. Whether you're an attorney looking for remote paralegal support or an individual needing help with legal filings, we're here to assist you every step of the way. 

Attorney Individual

*Click on the corresponding button representing your needs and complete the form to receive your FREE CONSULTATION.

What do we do for Attorneys?

Legal professionals rely on Task Force Legal Solutions for comprehensive virtual paralegal support. We specialize in delivering timely and accurate document preparation, legal research, case management, and other essential services. Our mission is to streamline your workload, enabling you to focus on client representation while we handle the administrative and legal support tasks remotely.  

What do we do for Individuals?

Individuals who require support in preparing and processing paperwork, such as court forms, petitions, or applications, may use our FIY (File-It-Yourself) service assistance. Task Force Legal Solutions does not provide legal advice; instead, we guide you through the appropriate steps to ensure that your legal documents are completed and submitted accurately, making the filing procedure more manageable and accessible.

"Meet Tina Marie Harvey, Senior Paralegal at Task Force Legal Solutions. Over the past decade, Tina has developed a strong understanding of the legal profession and has extensive experience in corporate compliance, insurance claims analysis, legal documentation, and policy and procedure implementation. She combines her strategic knowledge and research expertise to provide impactful outcomes. A talented problem-solver with meticulous attention to detail, she provides innovative legal support tailored to clients' needs."
Practice Area : Case Advisory

Attorney Pricing Plans

Tier 1 Plan - Monthly

- 15 Hours
  • Hourly rate tailored to straightforward tasks.
  • Document drafting and review (basic forms, contracts, or pleadings).
  • Summaries of legal research.
  • Case file organization and maintenance.
  • Limited client or attorney correspondence support.
  • Assistance with initial court filings and forms.
CONTACT US

Tier 2 Plan - Monthly

- 30 Hours
  • Includes all Tier 1 services, plus:
  • E-filing preparation and submission support.
  • Drafting of discovery requests and responses.
  • Assistance with trial preparation (e.g., exhibit indexing, witness outlines)
  • Coordination of case schedules and deadlines.
  • Priority response within 24 hours for urgent requests.
CONTACT US

Tier 3 Plan - Monthly

- 50 Hours
  • Includes all Tier 1 and Tier 2 services, plus:
  • Comprehensive case management and workflow support.
  • Drafting of complex legal documents (e.g., motions, briefs).
  • Assistance with e-discovery and document production.
  • Virtual support for depositions, hearings and client meetings
  • Advanced trial preparation with trial binders and exhibit organization.
CONTACT US

Top Tier Plan:

Cased-Based Pricing (Long-Term Support)

  • Fully customizable services tailored to your specific needs and caseload.
  • Dedicated paralegal support for ongoing case management and project continuity.
  • Drafting and review of complex legal documents, including motions, briefs, and contracts.
  • Assistance with e-discovery, document production, and trial preparation.
  • Coordination of case schedules, deadlines, and filings.
  • Virtual meeting support, including note-taking and presentation preparation.
  • Priority response with guaranteed same-day turnaround for urgent tasks.
  • Hourly rate adjusted based on caseload volume and the scope of services required.
  • Ideal for attorneys and firms managing fluctuating or high-volume workloads.
CONTACT US

File-It-Yourself (FIY) Support

Thrive Service - Bankruptcy
  • Comprehensive document preparation and organization for bankruptcy filing.
  • Assistance with bankruptcy forms and schedules.
  • Guidance on filing procedures and post-filing steps.
  • Support with creditor communications and case follow-up.
Read More

Transitions Service - Family

  • Preparation and filing of divorce, custody, or child support documents.
  • Drafting agreements and parenting plans.
  • Assistance with financial disclosures and court-required documentation.
  • Case management support and modification request preparation.
Read More

Triumph Service - Traffic

  • Research and guidance for resolving traffic violations or tickets.
  • Preparation of court responses or defense documents.
  • Assistance with filing procedures and representation preparation.
  • Strategies for reducing fines or mitigating penalties
Read More

Top Notch Plan:

Customizable Services Tailored support designed to address unique legal challenges, including:

  • Preparation and filing of divorce, custody, or child support documents.
  • Drafting agreements and parenting plans.
  • Assistance with financial disclosures and court-required documentation.
  • Case management support and modification request preparation.
Read More

Top Notch Service - Custom

  • Case law and statutory analysis using advanced legal databases
  • Custom legal memoranda for specific issues or cases
  • Chronological timelines and summaries for medical records in litigation
  • Identification of inconsistencies or key evidence in medical documentation
  • Drafting personalized documents for unique legal matters
  • Assistance with compliance, administrative filings, and niche legal needs
  • Flexible support tailored to individual legal challenges
Read More

Contact Us:

Phone : (919) 438-3030

Email: info@taskforcelegalsolutions.com

[elementor-element k="468365fb294b8c327fe68ecfd895096f" data=""]

How can we help you?

[elementor-element k="468365fb294b8c327fe68ecfd895096f" data=""]
Attorney
Individual
[elementor-element k="468365fb294b8c327fe68ecfd895096f" data=""]
What do we do for Attorneys?

Legal professionals rely on Task Force Legal Solutions for comprehensive virtual paralegal support. We specialize in delivering timely and accurate document preparation, legal research, case management, and other essential services. Our mission is to streamline your workload, enabling you to focus on client representation while we handle the administrative and legal support tasks remotely.  

What do we do for Individuals?

Individuals who require support in preparing and processing paperwork, such as court forms, petitions, or applications, may use our FIY (File-It-Yourself) service assistance. Task Force Legal Solutions does not provide legal advice; instead, we guide you through the appropriate steps to ensure that your legal documents are completed and submitted accurately, making the filing procedure more manageable and accessible.

"Meet Tina Marie Harvey, Senior Paralegal at Task Force Legal Solutions. Over the past decade, Tina has developed a strong understanding of the legal profession and has extensive experience in corporate compliance, insurance claims analysis, legal documentation, and policy and procedure implementation. She combines her strategic knowledge and research expertise to provide impactful outcomes. A talented problem-solver with meticulous attention to detail, she provides innovative legal support tailored to clients' needs."
Practice Area : Case Advisory

Attorney Pricing Plans

Tier 1 Plan - Monthly

- 15 Hours
  • Hourly rate tailored to straightforward tasks.
  • Document drafting and review (basic forms, contracts, or pleadings).
  • Summaries of legal research.
  • Case file organization and maintenance.
  • Limited client or attorney correspondence support.
  • Assistance with initial court filings and forms.
CONTACT US

Tier 2 Plan - Monthly

- 30 Hours
  • Includes all Tier 1 services, plus:
  • E-filing preparation and submission support.
  • Drafting of discovery requests and responses.
  • Assistance with trial preparation (e.g., exhibit indexing, witness outlines)
  • Coordination of case schedules and deadlines.
  • Priority response within 24 hours for urgent requests.
CONTACT US

Tier 3 Plan - Monthly

- 50 Hours
  • Includes all Tier 1 and Tier 2 services, plus:
  • Comprehensive case management and workflow support.
  • Drafting of complex legal documents (e.g., motions, briefs).
  • Assistance with e-discovery and document production.
  • Virtual support for depositions, hearings and client meetings
  • Advanced trial preparation with trial binders and exhibit organization.
CONTACT US

Top Tier Plan:

Cased-Based Pricing (Long-Term Support)

  • Fully customizable services tailored to your specific needs and caseload.
  • Dedicated paralegal support for ongoing case management and project continuity.
  • Drafting and review of complex legal documents, including motions, briefs, and contracts.
  • Assistance with e-discovery, document production, and trial preparation.
  • Coordination of case schedules, deadlines, and filings.
  • Virtual meeting support, including note-taking and presentation preparation.
  • Priority response with guaranteed same-day turnaround for urgent tasks.
  • Hourly rate adjusted based on caseload volume and the scope of services required.
  • Ideal for attorneys and firms managing fluctuating or high-volume workloads.
CONTACT US

File-It-Yourself (FIY) Support

Thrive Service - Bankruptcy
  • Comprehensive document preparation and organization for bankruptcy filing.
  • Assistance with bankruptcy forms and schedules.
  • Guidance on filing procedures and post-filing steps.
  • Support with creditor communications and case follow-up.
Read More

Transitions Service - Family

  • Preparation and filing of divorce, custody, or child support documents.
  • Drafting agreements and parenting plans.
  • Assistance with financial disclosures and court-required documentation.
  • Case management support and modification request preparation.
Read More

Triumph Service - Traffic

  • Research and guidance for resolving traffic violations or tickets.
  • Preparation of court responses or defense documents.
  • Assistance with filing procedures and representation preparation.
  • Strategies for reducing fines or mitigating penalties
Read More

Top Notch Plan:

Customizable Services Tailored support designed to address unique legal challenges, including:

  • Preparation and filing of divorce, custody, or child support documents.
  • Drafting agreements and parenting plans.
  • Assistance with financial disclosures and court-required documentation.
  • Case management support and modification request preparation.
Read More

Top Notch Service - Custom

  • Case law and statutory analysis using advanced legal databases
  • Custom legal memoranda for specific issues or cases
  • Chronological timelines and summaries for medical records in litigation
  • Identification of inconsistencies or key evidence in medical documentation
  • Drafting personalized documents for unique legal matters
  • Assistance with compliance, administrative filings, and niche legal needs
  • Flexible support tailored to individual legal challenges
Read More

item.title: Services
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Contact Us

How can we help you?

At Task Force Legal Services, we pride ourselves on delivering professional, reliable, and confidential services. Whether you're an attorney looking for remote paralegal support or an individual needing help with legal filings, we're here to assist you every step of the way.

Personal Professional What do we do for Individuals?

Our DIY legal assistance is designed for individuals who need help with preparing and filing legal paperwork, such as court documents, petitions, or applications. While we do not offer legal advice, we guide you through the necessary steps to ensure your documents are completed and filed correctly, making the legal process easier and more accessible.

What do we do for Attorneys?

We offer comprehensive virtual paralegal support to legal professionals, ensuring timely and accurate document preparation, legal research, case management, and other essential services. Our goal is to streamline your workload, allowing you to focus on client representation while we handle the administrative and legal support tasks remotely.

FAQ Help Topics

item.title: Thrive Service — Bankruptcy Support1
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Contact us for assistance: test

The Thrive service provides pro se and self-help support for individuals pursuing Chapter 7 bankruptcy filings. Services focus on administrative assistance, document preparation based on client-provided information, and general procedural guidance consistent with North Carolina paralegal standards. We assist with preparation of required bankruptcy forms and schedules using information provided by the client and provide general information regarding filing procedures, court processes, and required documentation. Support is provided throughout the filing process to help individuals organize documentation, understand procedural requirements, and prepare for submission of filings.

Why Choose TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS?

• Professional Administrative Support: Assistance with document preparation and organization for self-represented individuals • Client Empowerment: General legal information to support informed self-representation • Organized Filing Assistance: Support in preparing documents for court submission • Attention to Detail: Administrative review for completeness and organization of filings • Personalized Support: Services tailored to client-directed needs and procedural requirements TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS provides paralegal support to pro se clients to assist them in navigating procedural aspects of legal filings. Services are intended to support organization, preparation, and submission of court documents while maintaining client self-representation. Disclaimer: TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice, legal representation, or attorney services. Services are limited to administrative support, document preparation, and general legal information. All legal decisions remain the responsibility of the client. Filing fees and court costs are not included. In need of professional administrative support for self-represented filings, we are available to assist you. Would you like to learn more about filing your own court documents or receive additional self-help resources? Click the Resources button below.

item.title: Transitions Service — Family Support2
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Contact us for assistance: The Transitions Plan provides pro se and self-help support for individuals navigating family law matters, including divorce, custody, child support, and related civil proceedings. Services focus on administrative assistance, client-directed document preparation, and general procedural guidance consistent with North Carolina paralegal standards. Support includes preparation of family law forms based on client-provided information, organization of financial disclosure documents, and assistance with court filing procedures. Clients receive administrative support to help organize documentation, understand procedural requirements, and prepare filings for self-representation. General legal information regarding family law processes, court procedures, and filing requirements is provided to assist individuals in navigating the legal system while maintaining self-representation.

Why Choose TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS?

• Professional Administrative Support: Assistance with document preparation and organization for self-represented individuals • Client Empowerment: General legal information to support informed self-representation • Organized Filing Assistance: Support in preparing documents for court submission • Attention to Detail: Administrative review for completeness and organization of filings • Personalized Support: Services tailored to client-directed needs and procedural requirements TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS provides paralegal support to pro se clients to assist them in navigating procedural aspects of family law filings. Services are intended to support organization, preparation, and submission of court documents while maintaining client self-representation. Disclaimer: TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice, legal representation, or attorney services. Services are limited to administrative support, document preparation, and general legal information. All legal decisions remain the responsibility of the client. Filing fees and court costs are not included. In need of professional administrative support for self-represented family law matters, we are available to assist you. Would you like to learn more about filing your own court documents or receive additional self-help resources? Click the Resources button below.

item.title: Triumph Service — Traffic Support2
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Contact us for assistance:

The Triumph Service provides pro se and self-help support for individuals addressing traffic-related matters. Services focus on administrative assistance, client-directed document preparation, and general procedural guidance consistent with North Carolina paralegal standards. Support includes preparation of traffic-related documents based on client-provided information, assistance with court filing procedures, and organization of documentation for submission. Administrative support is provided to help individuals understand procedural requirements, prepare filings, and navigate traffic court processes while maintaining self-representation. General legal information regarding traffic court procedures, filing requirements, and court processes is provided to assist individuals in preparing for court and managing traffic-related matters.

Why Choose TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS?

• Professional Administrative Support: Assistance with document preparation and organization for self-represented individuals • Client Empowerment: General legal information to support informed self-representation • Organized Filing Assistance: Support in preparing documents for court submission • Attention to Detail: Administrative review for completeness and organization of filings • Personalized Support: Services tailored to client-directed needs and procedural requirements TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS provides paralegal support to pro se clients to assist them in navigating procedural aspects of traffic-related filings. Services are intended to support organization, preparation, and submission of court documents while maintaining client self-representation. Disclaimer: TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice, legal representation, or attorney services. Services are limited to administrative support, document preparation, and general legal information. All legal decisions remain the responsibility of the client. Filing fees and court costs are not included. In need of professional administrative support for self-represented traffic matters, we are available to assist you. item.title: Top Notch Service
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Contact us for assistance: 

The Top Notch Service provides pro se and self-help support for individuals pursuing small claims matters. Services focus on administrative assistance, client-directed document preparation, and general procedural information consistent with North Carolina paralegal standards. Support includes preparation of small claims forms based on information provided by the client, assistance with organizing documentation, and general information regarding filing procedures and court processes. Administrative assistance is provided to help individuals prepare documentation, organize timelines, and assemble supporting materials for submission. For landlord-tenant matters, administrative support may include preparation of client-directed documents, organization of supporting documentation, and general procedural information regarding small claims court processes. Assistance is limited to document preparation, organization, and procedural information for individuals maintaining self-representation.

Why Choose TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS?

• Professional Administrative Support: Assistance with document preparation and organization for self-represented individuals • Client Empowerment: General legal information to support informed self-representation • Organized Filing Assistance: Support in preparing documents for court submission • Attention to Detail: Administrative review for completeness and organization of filings • Personalized Support: Services tailored to client-directed needs and procedural requirements TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS provides paralegal support to pro se clients to assist them in navigating procedural aspects of small claims filings. Services are intended to support organization, preparation, and submission of court documents while maintaining client self-representation. Disclaimer: TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice, legal representation, or attorney services. Services are limited to administrative support, document preparation, and general legal information. All legal decisions remain the responsibility of the client. Filing fees and court costs are not included. In need of professional administrative support for self-represented small claims matters, we are available to assist you. item.title: Resources
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Resources

Justia North Carolina Law is a comprehensive resource for state laws, case summaries, and legal updates specific to North Carolina.

Read More

Legal Aid NC offers free legal help for low-income individuals facing civil legal issues, such as housing, family law, and public benefits disputes.

Read More

North Carolina eCourts Portal provides online access to calendar dates, court records, case status, and electronic filings for cases in North Carolina.

Read More

File-It-Yourself Domestic Packetsprovides forms and guidance for family law cases, such as custody, child support, and divorce, in Wake County.is a comprehensive resource for state laws, case summaries, and legal updates specific to North Carolina.

Read More

The North Carolina State Bar offers information on workplace laws, employee rights, and filing complaints for labor violations.

Read More

The LawHelpNC Online Forms
offers free, customizable legal forms for various legal issues, including family law, housing, and estate planning.

Read More

The NC Judicial Branch offers Pro Se Absolute Divorce Packet to help individuals in Durham County navigate self-representation in divorce cases.

Read More

NC Second Chance provides guidance on expunging criminal records and understanding eligibility for record clearing in North Carolina Read More

item.title: Triumph Service — Traffic Support
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Contact us for assistance:

The Triumph Service provides pro se and self-help support for individuals addressing traffic-related matters. Services focus on administrative assistance, client-directed document preparation, and general procedural guidance consistent with North Carolina paralegal standards.

Support includes preparation of traffic-related documents based on client-provided information, assistance with court filing procedures, and organization of documentation for submission. Administrative support is provided to help individuals understand procedural requirements, prepare filings, and navigate traffic court processes while maintaining self-representation.

General legal information regarding traffic court procedures, filing requirements, and court processes is provided to assist individuals in preparing for court and managing traffic-related matters.

Why Choose TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS?

• Professional Administrative Support: Assistance with document preparation and organization for self-represented individuals
• Client Empowerment: General legal information to support informed self-representation
• Organized Filing Assistance: Support in preparing documents for court submission
• Attention to Detail: Administrative review for completeness and organization of filings
• Personalized Support: Services tailored to client-directed needs and procedural requirements

TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS provides paralegal support to pro se clients to assist them in navigating procedural aspects of traffic-related filings. Services are intended to support organization, preparation, and submission of court documents while maintaining client self-representation.

Disclaimer: TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice, legal representation, or attorney services. Services are limited to administrative support, document preparation, and general legal information. All legal decisions remain the responsibility of the client. Filing fees and court costs are not included.

In need of professional administrative support for self-represented traffic matters, we are available to assist you.

Would you like to learn more about filing your own court documents or receive additional self-help resources? Click the Resources button below.

Contact Us
Go to Resources

item.title: Thrive Service — Bankruptcy Support2
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Contact us for assistance: test2

The Thrive service provides pro se and self-help support for individuals pursuing Chapter 7 bankruptcy filings. Services focus on administrative assistance, document preparation based on client-provided information, and general procedural guidance consistent with North Carolina paralegal standards. We assist with preparation of required bankruptcy forms and schedules using information provided by the client and provide general information regarding filing procedures, court processes, and required documentation. Support is provided throughout the filing process to help individuals organize documentation, understand procedural requirements, and prepare for submission of filings.

Why Choose TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS?

• Professional Administrative Support: Assistance with document preparation and organization for self-represented individuals • Client Empowerment: General legal information to support informed self-representation • Organized Filing Assistance: Support in preparing documents for court submission • Attention to Detail: Administrative review for completeness and organization of filings • Personalized Support: Services tailored to client-directed needs and procedural requirements TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS provides paralegal support to pro se clients to assist them in navigating procedural aspects of legal filings. Services are intended to support organization, preparation, and submission of court documents while maintaining client self-representation. Disclaimer: TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice, legal representation, or attorney services. Services are limited to administrative support, document preparation, and general legal information. All legal decisions remain the responsibility of the client. Filing fees and court costs are not included. In need of professional administrative support for self-represented filings, we are available to assist you. Would you like to learn more about filing your own court documents or receive additional self-help resources? Click the Resources button below.

item.title: Transitions Service — Family Support
item.dc:creator: taskforcelegalsolutions
item.content:encoded:
Contact us for assistance:

The Transitions Plan provides pro se and self-help support for individuals navigating family law matters, including divorce, custody, child support, and related civil proceedings. Services focus on administrative assistance, client-directed document preparation, and general procedural guidance consistent with North Carolina paralegal standards.

Support includes preparation of family law forms based on client-provided information, organization of financial disclosure documents, and assistance with court filing procedures. Clients receive administrative support to help organize documentation, understand procedural requirements, and prepare filings for self-representation.

General legal information regarding family law processes, court procedures, and filing requirements is provided to assist individuals in navigating the legal system while maintaining self-representation.

Why Choose TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS?

• Professional Administrative Support: Assistance with document preparation and organization for self-represented individuals
• Client Empowerment: General legal information to support informed self-representation
• Organized Filing Assistance: Support in preparing documents for court submission
• Attention to Detail: Administrative review for completeness and organization of filings
• Personalized Support: Services tailored to client-directed needs and procedural requirements

Disclaimer: TASK FORCE LEGAL SOLUTIONS is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice, legal representation, or attorney services. Services are limited to administrative support, document preparation, and general legal information. All legal decisions remain the responsibility of the client. Filing fees and court costs are not included.

Would you like to learn more about filing your own court documents or receive additional self-help resources? Click the Resources button below.
